skill.name: code-review-performance
skill.description: Performance-focused review lens for identifying inefficiencies, high-cost query shapes, resource waste, and worst-case scalability issues during code review.
skill.author: Agent Skills Team

name: code-review-performance
description: Performance review lens for algorithmic cost, data access, caching, concurrency, and worst-case resource usage.

categories.name: Algorithmic Complexity
categories.description: Complexity growth, nested loops, and expensive recomputation

categories.name: Database Performance
categories.description: N+1 queries, indexes, joins, and query-shape efficiency

categories.name: Network I/O
categories.description: Batching, pagination, parallelism, timeouts, and unnecessary round trips

categories.name: Memory Management
categories.description: Leaks, retention, object copying, and unbounded collections

categories.name: Caching Strategy
categories.description: Cacheability, invalidation, key design, and cold-path cost

categories.name: Concurrency
categories.description: Blocking work, pool exhaustion, async behavior, and race-related throughput loss

categories.name: Asset & Payload Optimization
categories.description: Bundles, images, compression, and lazy loading opportunities
